name: code-review
description: On-demand code review: scan recent commits, review each file, prioritize fixes

tasks.prompt:
Scan the last 5 commits:

1. Run `git diff HEAD~5..HEAD --stat`
2. Run `git diff HEAD~5..HEAD --name-only`
3. Run `git log --oneline -5`

Output:
## Recent Commits
[commits]
## Changed Files
[files sorted by change volume]
## Summary
[2-3 sentences on overall direction]

Review each changed file from the scan:

{{scan.results}}

For each file, check:
- Security: injection, XSS, hardcoded secrets, path traversal
- Quality: unhandled errors, resource leaks, race conditions
- Robustness: boundary conditions, input validation, null handling

Output a per-file review report.

From this review:

{{review.results}}

List the top 3 issues to fix, ranked by severity (security > data loss > bugs > quality).

For each: file, problem, risk, fix direction.

End with an overall assessment.
